pi_items.source: Task setup script (setup_task.sh) downloads the file to this exact path.
Environment setup script (setup_artifactory.sh) and verification script (export_result.sh) use this default auto-created repository.
Task instructions and verification script (export_result.sh) use this exact base path.
Downloaded the actual JAR from Maven Central and verified these files exist at the archive root.

privileged_info_summary: The artifact is a real Apache Commons Lang 3.14.0 Javadoc JAR downloaded from Maven Central to '/home/ga/Desktop/commons-lang3-javadoc.jar'. The target repository is the default 'example-repo-local' and the deployment path is 'javadocs/commons-lang3'. When successfully exploded, the JAR contents (including 'index.html', 'element-list', and 'help-doc.html') are extracted directly into this target folder.
